initial_failure.symptom: Windows 127.0.0.1:8765 retained a wslrelay listener but GET /health timed out with zero response bytes.
initial_failure.owned_stop: The prior service process was sent TERM through Ubuntu. Its listener and GPU lease were released; no unrelated WSL/Docker/CVAT/Nuclio process was stopped.

recovery_attempts.cleanup: owned process exited; no listener or lock remained

recovery_attempts.result: Ubuntu service healthy but required Windows loopback gate failed
recovery_attempts.gpu_lock: owned/readable serve_mode_b lock for Linux PID 383 while running
recovery_attempts.cleanup: Stopped only owned Windows WSL client PID 35240; verified Linux PID 383 and both listeners absent; removed only its verified stale project GPU lock; logs preserved.

truth_boundary: The pinned MaskFactory interpreter and application passed import and Ubuntu-internal health/model/lease checks, but the required Windows localhost forwarding gate failed. This is a bounded WSL localhost-forwarding recovery failure, not a champion prediction, service-health pass, runtime certificate, release, or global MaskFactory blocker.
